talkOpenings.title: How Talks Begin
talkOpenings.subtitle: The art of the opening line — how speakers start their conference talks

samples.opening: I pray my remarks this morning will find lodging in the hearts of everyone who hears them
samples.speaker: By Bishop Victor L. Brown
samples.title: Blessing the One

samples.opening: A friend of mine is having a difficult time in her life
samples.speaker: By Andrea Allen
samples.title: Trust in the Lord

samples.opening: I am always happy, my brethren, for the privilege I have of meeting with the priesthood
samples.speaker: N. Eldon Tanner
samples.title: Search for the Wanderers

samples.opening: What a marvelous day this has been, and what an incredible age in which we live
samples.speaker: Hugh W. Pinnock
samples.title: The Gospel Restored

samples.opening: In our world of skepticism, confusion and wickedness, to know the truth, to have a deep, humble, and solemn conviction that Jesus is the Christ, the Son of the living God, is a very precious thing
samples.speaker: George P. Lee
samples.title: “Behold My Beloved Son, in Whom I Am Well Pleased”

samples.opening: As a youth I visited the 1964 World’s Fair in New York City
samples.speaker: D. Todd Christofferson
samples.title: Reflections on a Consecrated Life

samples.opening: Young men, I should like to talk to you about your progress toward the eternities
samples.speaker: J. Thomas Fyans
samples.title: Prepare Now for Your Mission

samples.opening: As I contemplate the vast audience assembled for this general priesthood meeting of the Church, I seek the help of our Heavenly Father
samples.speaker: Thomas S. Monson
samples.title: “Be Thou an Example”

samples.opening: All over the world, from Asia to Africa, from New Zealand to Norway, the wonderful young women of The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints are turning hearts to the family
samples.speaker: By Margaret D. Nadauld
samples.title: Turning Hearts to the Family

samples.opening: I have prepared my message especially for you ten- and eleven-year-old girls
samples.speaker: By Michaelene P. Grassli
samples.title: I Will Follow God’s Plan for Me

samples.opening: In June of this year, Sister Nelson and I had the great privilege of accompanying the Mormon Tabernacle Choir on its historic concert tour in Europe
samples.speaker: Russell M. Nelson
samples.title: “These … Were Our Examples”

samples.opening: My brothers and sisters, we are living in a time in which we shall see things both wonderful and awful
samples.speaker: Neal A. Maxwell
samples.title: “Be of Good Cheer”

samples.opening: My dear brothers and sisters, I feel confident to stand before you at this hour, because just this morning I received a very important telegram from my seventeen-year-old daughter in Hong Kong
samples.speaker: Jacob de Jager
samples.title: Let There Be No Misunderstanding

samples.opening: A national author wrote a book about his greatest teacher
samples.speaker: Dallin H. Oaks
samples.title: Gospel Teaching

samples.opening: When I was sustained as a General Authority last April, I was serving as a mission president in India
samples.speaker: Randy D. Funk
samples.title: Called of Him to Declare His Word

samples.opening: As difficult as it may be, I would like to pay tribute today to a very noble soul who found the joy in living a life of service
samples.speaker: L. Tom Perry
samples.title: A Tribute

samples.opening: I feel greatly honored in being invited to bear testimony regarding my acquaintance and relationship with the leadership of the Church during the past nearly sixty-five years
samples.speaker: Joseph Anderson
samples.title: Presidents of the Church

samples.opening:
Brothers and sisters and friends, wherever you are:

As you have been advised, this service is a part of the 142nd Semiannual General Conference of The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints
samples.speaker: Marion G. Romney
samples.title: Why The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints

samples.opening: Approximately 18 months ago, in the fall of 2017, my 64-year-old brother Mike informed me that he had been diagnosed with pancreatic cancer
samples.speaker: By Bishop W. Christopher Waddell
samples.title: Just as He Did

samples.opening: The most unique feature of The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints is that it is governed by the Savior, through the promptings and direction of the Spirit
samples.speaker: Loren C. Dunn
samples.title: The Spirit Giveth Life

samples.opening:
I still rejoice in the wonderful spirit we felt as we sang together this morning:

Now let us rejoice in the day of salvation
samples.speaker: Dieter F. Uchtdorf
samples.title: Have We Not Reason to Rejoice?

samples.opening: When we left our heavenly home to take this trip through mortality, we received instructions and divine directions that would assist us in returning home safely to our Heavenly Father
samples.speaker: L. Lionel Kendrick
samples.title: Search the Scriptures

samples.opening: Thank God for the youth of the Church
samples.speaker: Paul H. Dunn
samples.title: We Have Been There All the Time

samples.opening: In a world of turmoil and uncertainty, it is more important than ever to make our families the center of our lives and the top of our priorities
samples.speaker: L. Tom Perry
samples.title: The Importance of the Family

samples.opening: The attention of people around the world has been drawn, during the past four weeks, to the willful, intentional, and destructive acts of terrorism and hatred
samples.speaker: Robert F. Orton
samples.title: “The First and Great Commandment”

samples.opening: My brethren and sisters, we now bring to a conclusion the 155th Semiannual General Conference of the Church
samples.speaker: Gordon B. Hinckley
samples.title: “Let Us Move This Work Forward”

samples.opening: My beloved brethren and sisters: First, may I thank you for being with us on this occasion, for this and the many other wonderful things which you do
samples.speaker: Gordon B. Hinckley
samples.title: Find the Lambs, Feed the Sheep

samples.opening: My dear brethren and sisters, I rejoice with you in being present this morning to hear the voice of our prophet, President Ezra Taft Benson, and to feel of his spirit and loving concern for all of man
samples.speaker: David B. Haight
samples.title: A Prophet Chosen of the Lord

samples.opening:
From the book of First Peter, we receive this counsel:

“But sanctify the Lord God in your hearts: and be ready always to give an answer to every man that asketh you a reason of the hope that is in yo
samples.speaker: L. Tom Perry
samples.title: Proclaim My Gospel from Land to Land

samples.opening: My brothers and sisters: This has been a wonderful conference
samples.speaker: Delbert L. Stapley
samples.title: Honesty and Integrity
